motivationalCatalysts.quote: The secret of getting ahead is getting started.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Mark Twain

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Your time is limited. Don't waste it living someone else's life.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Steve Jobs

motivationalCatalysts.quote: The way to get started is to quit talking and begin doing.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Walt Disney

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Focus on being productive instead of busy.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Tim Ferriss

motivationalCatalysts.quote: It's not about having time, it's about making time.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Unknown

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Small daily improvements are the key to staggering long-term results.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Robin Sharma

motivationalCatalysts.quote: The only way to do great work is to love what you do.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Steve Jobs

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Success is the sum of small efforts repeated day in and day out.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Robert Collier

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Don't count the days, make the days count.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Muhammad Ali

motivationalCatalysts.quote: Discipline is choosing between what you want now and what you want most.
motivationalCatalysts.author: Abraham Lincoln
